name: Butternut Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 lb butternut squash, pared, seeded and cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the chopped onions over medium heat until translucent.
2. Add butter and cook for an additional minute.
3. Stir in chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
4. Add butternut squash cubes and cook until tender.
5. Gently fold in sliced pears, thyme, salt, pepper, and coriander.
6. Reduce heat to low and stir in whipping cream until heated through.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Serve hot or at room temperature.
